pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Spring Boot 3.3 target.
Add explicit dependency for lombok-mapstruct-binding to ensure compatibility between Lombok and MapStruct annotation processors.

src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Migrate Spring Security HttpSecurity configuration from the deprecated XML-style fluent API to the new lambda-based DSL introduced in Spring Security 5.7+.
src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.why_exists: The old API methods like .cors().and() and .csrf().disable() are deprecated and may be removed in future Spring Security versions; while they might still compile in Spring Boot 3.3, the migration recipe explicitly targets modernization to the supported lambda DSL.

src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Migrate authorizeHttpRequests configuration from the deprecated XML-style fluent API to the new lambda-based DSL.
src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.why_exists: The old API methods like .authorizeHttpRequests().requestMatchers() are deprecated; the migration recipe targets modernization to the supported lambda DSL.

src/main/java/com/psiquelaboral/psique/a.general_idea: Add static import for Customizer.withDefaults() to support the new lambda-based Spring Security configuration style.
